note: Sprint 5.10: adds Trinity Background Autonomy Daemon v0.1. Runs local dry-run orchestration cycles, queues Useful Compute requests, executes local workers, validates replay, builds governance batches and records lessons. No automatic payout, no wallet access, no network, no consensus. scripts/trinity/trinity_background_daemon.py supports --run-once and --watch modes; all stages invoked in-process via importlib (no subprocess, no shell). Schema trinity-background-daemon-state/v0.1 carries eight const-true safety flags including local_dry_run_only, no_wallet_access, no_private_keys, no_automatic_payout, no_broadcast, no_network_required, no_consensus_changes, human_review_required_before_payment. State is byte-identical across runs that share seed, pinned_time and workspace basename. Daemon respects trinity_error_memory: a request that has a recorded lesson is skipped unless --allow-known-failures is set. Web Step 7 Background Autonomy Loop renders the loaded state file read-only (no network primitives, no sensitive inputs). docs/TRINITY_BACKGROUND_AUTONOMY_DAEMON_V01.md. Tests: 42 new across tests/trinity/test_{trinity_background_daemon,trinity_background_state_schema,trinity_background_web_safety}.py; static safety + no-network checks extended to cover the daemon; web-safety badge tests refactored to be sprint-version-agnostic. Trinity suite 355/355 PASS with materials-engine-private present. No consensus, RPC, node, miner, wallet or wire-format change.
